Container.Name: dns-monitoring
Container.Overview: DNS Monitoring — self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics web application. Monitors DNS queries, tracks statistics, and provides real-time dashboards.
Container.Instructions:
Option 1 - Build locally on Unraid:
1. SSH into Unraid terminal 2. git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring 3. cd dns-monitoring 4. docker build -t freemen810/dns-monitoring:latest . 5. Use this template to create the container
Option 2 - Pull from Docker Hub (after image is published): docker pull freemen810/dns-monitoring:latest

Config.Name: Backend API Port
Config.Description: Backend Express API port (typically exposed to frontend only)

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for DNS records and SQLite database
